The complete advanced-security syllabus, tracked end to end.

Sixteen domains that define a senior security professional — from threat modeling and applied cryptography to red teaming, DFIR, and AI security. Every module maps the topics you must own, the standards that govern them, the tools of the trade, the definitive books and courses, and hands-on labs. Tick topics as you master them — progress is saved to this browser.

// no modules match your filter

A suggested route through the console

Depth beats breadth, but sequence matters. Build the design and appsec base, branch into your specialty (offense or defense), then layer on the cross-cutting disciplines — crypto, IAM, and governance — that separate seniors from specialists.

Phase 01 · Base
Design & AppSec

Threat modeling, secure SDLC, web/API security, cryptography fundamentals. Everything downstream assumes these.

Phase 02 · Terrain
Cloud, Containers & Identity

Where modern systems actually live: cloud posture, Kubernetes, IAM, Zero Trust, and supply-chain integrity.

Phase 03 · Craft
Offense or Defense

Pick a lane and go deep — red teaming, exploit dev, and RE; or detection engineering, threat hunting, and DFIR.

Phase 04 · Command
Intel, GRC & AI

Threat intelligence, governance/risk/compliance, and the emerging frontier of AI/LLM security tie the practice together.

Certification roadmap — pick a lane, climb the tiers.

Certs don't make the professional, but they structure the journey and prove it to others. Each track runs entry → core → advanced → expert. Start with a foundational cert, then commit to the track that matches your specialty. Tick the ones you hold — progress is saved locally alongside your topic mastery.

Entry Core Advanced Expert
My focus

Exam practice — test your recall, not just your reading.

Answer exam-style multiple-choice questions drawn from every topic. Each answer gives instant feedback with an explanation and a link back to the lesson. Your weak topics are tracked so you can drill exactly what you keep missing — the fastest path to a passing score.
